main.name: Gixian Infiltrator
main.oracle_text: Whenever you sacrifice another permanent, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
main.flavor_text: "Terisia City's fall is inevitable. My master's plan runs as sure and steady as the oil in my veins."

card.name: Pulse of Murasa
card.oracle_text: Return target creature or land card from a graveyard to its owner's hand. You gain 6 life.
card.flavor_text: "Little flower twirl and bloom, arise from this your rocky tomb. Little warrior slash and brawl, be born again to free us all."

card.name: Crypt Incursion
card.oracle_text: Exile all creature cards from target player's graveyard. You gain 3 life for each card exiled this way.
card.flavor_text: The Golgari maze-runner Varolz hungers to prove his fortitude in battle, and his trail of victims feeds other hungers.

card.name: Makeshift Munitions
card.oracle_text: {1}, Sacrifice an artifact or creature: This enchantment deals 1 damage to any target.
card.flavor_text: "Grease up a firecannon good and proper with dinosaur-liver oil, and it'll shoot just about anything."

card.name: Bojuka Bog
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, exile target player's graveyard.
{T}: Add {B}.

card.name: Toxin Analysis
card.oracle_text: Target creature gains deathtouch and lifelink until end of turn. Investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")
card.flavor_text: "Poison this deadly is only used by the Ochran. Either the Golgari are behind this, or someone wants us to think they are."

card.name: Eviscerator's Insight
card.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact or creature.
Draw two cards.
Flashback {4}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost and any additional costs. Then exile it.)
card.flavor_text: "We're all just the sum of our parts."

card.name: Cast Down
card.oracle_text: Destroy target nonlegendary creature.
card.flavor_text:
"Your life is finished, your name lost, and your work forgotten. It is as though Mazeura never existed."
—*Chainer's Torment*

card.oracle_text:
Destroy target land. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.flavor_text: Every rebirth looks like a death.

tokens.name: Treasure
tokens.oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.

card_faces.name: Undercity
card_faces.oracle_text:
You can't enter this dungeon unless you "venture into Undercity."
Secret Entrance — Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. (Leads to: Forge, Lost Well)
Forge — Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature. (Leads to: Trap!, Arena)
Lost Well — Scry 2. (Leads to: Arena, Stash)
Trap! — Target player loses 5 life. (Leads to: Archives)
Arena — Goad target creature. (Leads to: Archives, Catacombs)
Stash — Create a Treasure token. (Leads to: Catacombs)
Archives — Draw a card. (Leads to: Throne of the Dead Three)
Catacombs — Create a 4/1 black Skeleton creature token with menace. (Leads to: Throne of the Dead Three)
Throne of the Dead Three — Reveal the top ten cards of your library. Put a creature card from among them onto the battlefield with three +1/+1 counters on it. It gains hexproof until your next turn. Then shuffle.

card_faces.name: The Initiative
card_faces.oracle_text:
Whenever one or more creatures a player controls deal combat damage to you, that player takes the initiative.
Whenever you take the initiative and at the beginning of your upkeep, venture into Undercity. (If you're in a dungeon, advance to the next room. If you're not, enter Undercity. You can take the initiative even if you already have it.)
